name: x-ai-weekly-bot
description: Weekly AI news curator that scrapes X timeline and generates AI-related summaries

scripts.docker:tag: VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && docker tag wifsimster/x-ai-weekly-bot:latest wifsimster/x-ai-weekly-bot:v$VERSION && docker tag wifsimster/x-ai-weekly-bot:latest wifsimster/x-ai-weekly-bot:$(echo $VERSION | cut -d. -f1-2) && docker tag wifsimster/x-ai-weekly-bot:latest wifsimster/x-ai-weekly-bot:$(echo $VERSION | cut -d. -f1)
scripts.release: npm run build && npm run docker:build && npm run docker:tag && npm run docker:push
